id.description: The id of the staff member

name.description: The names of the staff member

language.description: The primary language the staff member dub's in

languageV2.description: The primary language of the staff member. Current values: Japanese, English, Korean, Italian, Spanish, Portuguese, French, German, Hebrew, Hungarian, Chinese, Arabic, Filipino, Catalan, Finnish, Turkish, Dutch, Swedish, Thai, Tagalog, Malaysian, Indonesian, Vietnamese, Nepali, Hindi, Urdu

description.description: A general description of the staff member

gender.description: The staff's gender. Usually Male, Female, or Non-binary but can be any string.

yearsActive.description: [startYear, endYear] (If the 2nd value is not present staff is still active)

isFavourite.description: If the staff member is marked as favourite by the currently authenticated user

isFavouriteBlocked.description: If the staff member is blocked from being added to favourites

siteUrl.description: The url for the staff page on the AniList website

staffMedia.description: Media where the staff member has a production role

characterMedia.description: Media the actor voiced characters in. (Same data as characters with media as node instead of characters)

staff.description: Staff member that the submission is referencing

favourites.description: The amount of user's who have favourited the staff member
